summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GP Onboarding and Reports features. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all features working correctly - GP Onboarding with 3 tabs and 3 steps, Reports with 7 tabs, date filtering, and expense management.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test GP records and expenses during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: GP Onboarding and Reports features fully tested. All features working: GP Onboarding with 3 tabs (Onboarding/Active/Discontinued), 3 onboarding steps (Personal Info with bank details, Contract Signing with commission, Training), activation creates team user with Growth Partner role, discontinuation with reason, public tracking page at /gp-track/{token}. Reports page has 7 tabs (Overview, B2C, B2B, HR-Team, Educator HR, Growth Partners, P&L), date filtering (Month/Year/Custom), expense CRUD operations, B2B tab shows renewal ratio calculation.

gp_onboarding_page_loads.details: Page loads with 3 tabs (Onboarding 8, Active 1, Discontinued 1) and search functionality

gp_onboarding_3_steps.details: All 3 steps visible: Personal Information, Contract Signing, Training

gp_step_completion.details: All steps can be completed via API with proper data storage (bank details, commission structure, training notes)

gp_activation_creates_user.details: Activation creates team user with Growth Partner role, returns username and temp password

gp_activation_validation.details: Activation fails if not all steps are complete (returns 400 error)

gp_discontinuation.details: Discontinuation works with reason, updates status and deactivates team user

gp_public_tracking_page.details: Public tracking page at /gp-track/{token} shows partner info, progress bar, and all 3 steps with completion status

gp_invalid_tracking_token.details: Invalid token shows 'Link Not Found' error page

reports_7_tabs.details: All 7 tabs present: Overview, B2C (Students), B2B (Schools), HR-Team, Educator HR, Growth Partners, P&L Report

reports_date_filter.details: Date filter works with Month selector, Year selector, and Custom date range

reports_overview_tab.details: Shows Total Revenue, Total Expenses, Net Profit, Paid Students, Converted Schools, Active Educators, and pipeline funnels

reports_b2b_renewal_ratio.details: B2B tab shows Renewal Ratio with formula 'Renewed / (Active+Renewed+Lost)'

reports_pnl_tab.details: P&L tab shows Revenue Breakdown (Student/School), Expense Breakdown by category, Recent Expenses table with edit/delete

expense_crud.details: All expense CRUD operations work: Create, Read, Update, Delete

add_expense_modal.details: Add Expense modal has all fields: Title, Amount, Date, Category, Subcategory, Payment Method, Vendor, Description

expense_categories.details: Categories available: salary, marketing, operations, technology, office, travel, commission, utilities, professional_services, other

backend_api_tests.GET /api/gp-onboarding: PASS - Lists all GP onboarding records
backend_api_tests.POST /api/gp-onboarding/{id}/complete-st: PASS - Completes onboarding steps (personal_info, contract_signing, training)
backend_api_tests.POST /api/gp-onboarding/{id}/activate: PASS - Activates GP and creates team user
backend_api_tests.GET /api/admin/reports/sales-funnel: PASS - Returns sales funnel data for students/schools
backend_api_tests.GET /api/expenses: PASS - Lists expenses with date filter

notes.gp_onboarding_flow: Converting a Growth Partner to 'converted' status triggers GP onboarding initiation via POST /api/gp-onboarding/init/{partner_id}
notes.activation_creates_gp_role: If 'Growth Partner' role doesn't exist, it's auto-created during activation
notes.expense_totals: Expense totals are calculated correctly and displayed in P&L tab
